Localization.Description: Management of permissions for accessing a database object

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} granted a permission to access the object "{object.name}" to the user {object.account.name} in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} revoked a permission to access the object "{object.name}" from the user {object.account.name} in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to grant a permission to access the object "{object.name}" to the user {object.account.name} in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to revoke a permission to access the object "{object.name}" from the user {object.account.name} in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to change the owner of the object "{object.name}" to the user {object.account.name} in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} failed to deny access to the object "{object.name}" for the user {object.account.name} in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} denied access to the object "{object.name}" for the user {object.account.name} in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
The user {subject.account.name} changed the owner of the object "{object.name}" to the user {object.account.name} in the database "{datafield3}" in the instance "{datafield2}"
